routingPolicy: Active docs consume the global Codex multi-agent lane contract. Current direct user policy routes every new or resumed Codex-owned worker to gpt-5.6-sol at medium effort by default, permits higher Sol effort for harder work, and forbids Terra/Luna fallback or lower effort without a newer direct user instruction.
currentFocus: Keep Retry 11 failed and unpublished while its exact CDB/target exit-status contract is resolved; the bounded local-presentation path, controller guidance, and Ghidra closeout are integrated.

currentDocsTruth.release: v1.0.9 remains the latest published unsigned portable WinUI ZIP with 949 packaged Lore documents; this source slice does not publish a release.
currentDocsTruth.product: WinUI 3 is the primary preservation/modding GUI. The separate GPL rebuild has a deterministic Core/headless verifier and one playable procedural Godot .NET First Flight client; Electron, WPF, and the old Python GUI/CLI remain archived references.
currentDocsTruth.winUiFirstUse: CURRENT_CAPABILITIES.md and its byte-identical Lore mirror record the verified three-state setup hierarchy, preservation of temporarily unavailable remembered folders, manual Save Lab availability, shell status/focus ownership, Level 1 headings, compact wrapped source actions, truthful launch/Admin Level preset state, and demand-loaded Media VLC behavior. Save Lab Game Options now gives the official Steam Input modern-controller setup path, in-game binding/sensitivity steps, browser-labeled Ziggurat guide action, copied-options-only nonclaim, and raw numeric controller-config caveat.
currentDocsTruth.filesystemSafety: Save/options, AppCore copied-executable patching, and generated asset/package outputs use bounded roots, guarded or staged writes, final verification, recoverable full-file backups, and explicit same-user post-finalization limits.
currentDocsTruth.patchContract: The normative contract accounts for 29 catalog rows, 20 visible options, 9 hidden companions, 17 dependency edges, and 118 conflict edges. AppCore accepts only exact pinned mutation rows, publishes backup/checksum/apply/restore files atomically, and repairs damaged or truncated copies only from an integrity- and provenance-verified full-file backup. The normal Windowed & Mods flow now shows exact compatibility/recovery plus two initially unselected bounded Player Mods: PATCHED identity marker and non-save-awarding Goodies wall preview. Retained experimental and legacy recipes are grouped in a collapsed Lab. No patch bytes changed. Standalone Python patch scripts remain lab helpers without the AppCore atomic-publication guarantee.
currentDocsTruth.re: reverse-engineering/ is canonical. The integrated Ghidra closeout verifies the stable 6,411-function inventory and 459-address endpoint delta, reviews 92 unique proposed corrections, applies and exactly reads back 91 confirmed rows, rejects the erroneous 0x004dac90 manifest row, applies the separately leased 0x0050b9c0 structured prototype correction, and verifies complete pre/post stores. The recovered Cursor ledger remains incomplete, static metadata is not runtime/parity proof, and 0x004dac90 remains bounded metadata debt. Active historical probes/mutators that can reapply withdrawn CMonitor ownership remain a tooling follow-up.
currentDocsTruth.runtimeObserver: The approved design progresses from an exact-specimen Level 850 identity canary to controlled raw-state observation and then Level 100 corroboration. Tasks 1-4 provide PE32-safe fingerprints, strict sanitized materialization, exact receipt-bound CDB/input identity, the locked unpatched protocol, and authority-gated fixed-role orchestration. Task 5 has eleven preserved failed runs and no published matrix. The correction integrated through 647bbaa4 retains all exact process/module/log, target-event, hash, marker, managed-stop, no-runner-force, and census guards. Normal CDB exit zero is unchanged; exceptional -1 requires target status 0xFFFFFFFF, ForceRequested plus ExitObserved, and a semantically valid retained transcript from readiness through EOF with no unexpected diagnostics or format drift. The four focused suites pass 132 tests and Codex plus sanitized Grok normal/adversarial review accept. Retry 11 remains failed and proves no Q causality; a wholly fresh Retry 12 is authorized. Stage A still excludes timing, field semantics, handling, and parity claims.
currentDocsTruth.referenceCorpora: The pinned audit records Onslaught 5352a81 as an incomplete architecture corpus and AYAResourceExtractor 53b10b0 as Stuart master plus one narrow rectangular-DDS copy-bound correction. AYA remains a Windows x86 static model/texture exporter with format, fixture, build, mutable-dependency, and component-license gaps; neither reference is Steam behavior or completeness authority.
currentDocsTruth.lore: The 949-document package count proves packaged breadth, not editorial completeness, freshness, provenance/rights review, or broad public-safety approval.
currentDocsTruth.rebuild: The GPL-3.0-or-later RE-informed source rebuild includes the deterministic net8 Core/headless verifier, pure real-time Client adapter, and playable procedural Godot 4.7 First Flight view. Transform, energy, shield, movement, arena, and default presentation choices remain synthetic. Main now also contains an optional ignored trusted-local exporter/bootstrap path and presentation-only Godot adapter for bounded self-contained GLB or custom-parsed OBJ meshes; it uses content-addressed roles and manifest-last activation while ordinary smoke stays synthetic. This does not prove asset origin, visual fidelity, handling, or parity. The completion target remains one reproducible BYO-asset, evidence-backed playable vertical slice, not full retail parity, and the client is not in the published v1.0.9 WinUI ZIP.
currentDocsTruth.curatedSourcePackage: The curated artifact is a self-contained, plain non-Git convenience package over the already-public canonical repo, not a replacement checkout or a private/public legal cut. The accepted First Flight source candidate selected 721 files, materialized 726 files with export metadata, excluded the real game-generated save baseline, and passed standalone payload/inventory, docs, npm test, notices, and hygiene gates.

activeBlockers: CURRENT_CAPABILITIES.md and reverse-engineering/RE-INDEX.md remain too large for fast contributor orientation.
release/readiness/ and tools/ still need generated front-door indexes before broad movement or deletion.
Lore needs an explicit editorial allowlist, third-party-text inventory, rights/provenance review, and generated canonical projections before another release.
The grouped WinUI action/reaction map still needs a verified control-by-control refresh against the current GUI.
The movement slice still lacks copied-runtime measurements, and the AYA lane lacks a tracked public end-to-end synthetic export fixture plus resolved component-license posture.
Active BattleEngine historical probes/mutators can still reapply withdrawn CMonitor ownership; they must be retired or fail-closed before another related Ghidra mutation wave.
The AYA export orchestrator preflights only legacy AYA/DDS DLLs even though the harness also requires Fbx.dll and an FBX template.
nextSteps: Resolve Retry 11's exact CDB/target exit-status relationship with a failing disposable test and narrow identity-bound rule, then run a wholly fresh Retry 12 and publish only a complete sanitized result.
Use the integrated ignored local-asset exporter/bootstrap and Godot adapter for the next evidence-backed presentation slice while preserving synthetic smoke and non-parity wording.
Retain the integrated Ghidra recovery overlay and transcript evidence; separately review the remaining 0x004dac90 metadata debt.
Retire stale BattleEngine ownership tooling and add fail-fast Fbx.dll plus FBX-template preflight with focused tests.
Freeze one accepted public-safe movement/morph/camera behavior contract, implement it in deterministic Core, then continue the Lore editorial/provenance pass.
